examples: "There is an enormous opportunity here, and a lot of pressure and responsibility to think about how we urbanize," says Seto.
Is this necessary to urbanize a rural country?
They still have to urbanize another 400 million people at least.
About 25 million Chinese are expected to urbanize from the countryside to cities each year.
The country must urbanize if it has to develop economically, it cannot continue to live in villages.
